name: Sour Cream Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together all dry ingredients.
2. In a separate bowl, beat together the egg yolks, sour cream, milk, and melted butter (or oil).
3. Add the wet mixture to the dry mix. Mix thoroughly until combined.
4. Beat the egg whites until stiff and fold them in completely.
5. Cook in a preheated waffle iron.
